title: run_generator payload
description: Payload for the viewer node `run_generator` surface. The host resolves `slug` in the shared @viewer/core generator registry, runs it with `params` to produce a View[], then opens every emitted View (desktop window / spatial HTML panel). This is the declarative-authoring symmetry of the spatial `POST /generators/{slug}/run` HTTP route — same generator code, same View contract, driven over the mesh.

params.description: Generator-specific parameters. Omitted/empty yields the generator's populated default demo.
